articles.title: Meta won’t have to face the next planned social media addiction trial
articles.description: Less than a week before Meta's lawyers were set to return to a Los Angeles courtroom, the plaintiff accusing the platform of inflicting harm dropped the case. Brought by 15-year-old Florida plaintiff going by initials R.K.C., the case was set to be the second in a set of bellwether trials meant to test legal arguments […]
articles.author: Lauren Feiner

articles.title: Tesla’s revenues are bouncing back, but profits are still weak
articles.description: After a dismal two years of weakening demand, falling sales, and damage to its brand by Elon Musk's political activities, Tesla's road to recovery continues apace. On the heels of an impressive delivery report, the company released its earnings for the second quarter of 2026 - giving us the latest glimpse at the EV company […]
articles.author: Andrew J. Hawkins

articles.title: Price-hiked iPads are a little cheaper right now
articles.description: A number of Apple products got more expensive last month, so we’re happy to find deals wherever and whenever we can. If you’re searching for a high-end iPad, one of the more notable deals currently happening is on the 13-inch iPad Pro M5 with 512GB of storage. Normally $1,699, it’s $150 off at Amazon, costing […]
articles.author: Brad Bourque

articles.title: iOS code could reportedly let Apple cut off apps when users miss iPhone payments
articles.description: Code found in an iOS 27 beta would allow Apple to put a financed iPhone in "Restricted Mode" if it detects any missed payments, 9to5Mac reports. The finding follows a story from Bloomberg earlier this week claiming Apple is preparing to launch a new "Apple Upgrade" financing program for leasing new devices. iPhones in "Restricted […]
articles.author: Stevie Bonifield

articles.title: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
articles.description: Following the MacBook Neo's huge popularity so far, Apple is reportedly developing an updated version of its budget laptop with a new processor and more memory, and even has plans to refresh the model with new colors. Following a similar report from analyst Tim Culpan earlier this year, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman says the new Neo […]
articles.author: Stevie Bonifield

articles.title: Here's what Samsung's smart glasses actually look like
articles.description: Samsung has given us our first chance to check out its upcoming smart glasses in person, revealing two new designs and the first specs in the process, including an impressive 9-hour battery life. The glasses, developed in collaboration with Google and the eyewear brands Gentle Monster and Warby Parker, are due to launch this fall. […]
articles.author: Dominic Preston

articles.title: How the Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 phones compare
articles.description: Samsung's latest round of folding Galaxy Z phones and updated smartwatches were announced at its July 2026 Unpacked event and are set to launch on August 7th. The Galaxy Z Flip 8, Fold 8, and Fold 8 Ultra don't seem geared toward people who bought last year's model; aside from a few design updates and […]
articles.author: Brad Bourque

articles.title: Preorders for Samsung’s new Z Fold and Flip 8 come with up to $350 in gift cards
articles.description: Samsung's newest foldables are here. At Galaxy Unpacked, the company announced the Galaxy Z Flip 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8, and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. All three devices will be available on August 7th, but you can preorder them now starting at $1,199.99, $1,899.99, and $2,099.99, respectively. You probably noticed that Samsung's foldable lineup […]
articles.author: Sheena Vasani

articles.title: Philips’ new smart toothbrush shows you where you didn’t properly brush
articles.description: The latest addition to Philips' Sonicare line of smart electric toothbrushes could take the guesswork out of your brushing routine. The Next-Generation DiamondClean 9900 Prestige uses a third-generation AI model to provide real-time feedback on how you're brushing through a glowing ring on its base, while a touchscreen highlights areas of your mouth that may […]
articles.author: Andrew Liszewski

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked July 2026: How to watch
articles.description: Samsung's next Galaxy Unpacked event is just around the corner, and the company is expected to take the wraps off a bunch of new devices. Based on the rumors and leaks we've seen so far, Samsung's next generation of foldables will likely be the stars of the show. Samsung is expected to show off a […]
